message:
refactor(html_export): remove unused render_conversation function

Remove render_conversation() from renderer.rs (59 lines) and its
re-export from mod.rs. This function rendered individual messages
sequentially, but all call sites now use render_message_groups()
which provides proper message grouping, consolidated tool call
badges, and the Terminal Noir glassmorphism styling. The function
had no remaining callers after the HTML export redesign
(coding_agent_session_search-2f3o).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
